name: kids-srs
description: Spaced repetition study app for young children (ages 5-8). Fully offline PWA.

scripts.deploy: bun run build:versioned && bun --env-file=.env run surge:only
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build:versioned && bun --env-file=.env run surge:preview
scripts.test:e2e: docker build -f Dockerfile.e2e --build-arg VITE_E2E_BUILD=true -t kids-srs-e2e . && docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/e2e/reports:/app/e2e/reports" -v "${PWD}/e2e/screenshots:/app/e2e/screenshots" kids-srs-e2e
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: docker build -f Dockerfile.e2e --build-arg VITE_E2E_BUILD=true -t kids-srs-e2e . && docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/e2e/reports:/app/e2e/reports" -v "${PWD}/e2e/screenshots:/app/e2e/screenshots" kids-srs-e2e --profile smoke
